mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_GUESTBOOK.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_GUESTBOOK (ID, GUESTBOOK_CONTENT, OWNER_MEMBER_ID, WRITER_MEMBER_ID) VALUES (#{id}, #{guestbookContent}, #{ownerMemberId}, #{writerMemberId})
mapper.select: SELECT TBG.ID, TBG.GUESTBOOK_CONTENT, TBG.GUESTBOOK_CREATED_AT, TBG.OWNER_MEMBER_ID, TBG.WRITER_MEMBER_ID, TBW.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS WRITER_NICKNAME, TBW.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL AS WRITER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, TBO.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS OWNER_NICKNAME, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_GUESTBOOK_LIKE TBGL WHERE TBGL.GUESTBOOK_ID = TBG.ID) AS LIKE_COUNT FROM TBL_GUESTBOOK TBG JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBW ON TBG.WRITER_MEMBER_ID = TBW.ID JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBO ON TBG.OWNER_MEMBER_ID = TBO.ID WHERE TBG.OWNER_MEMBER_ID = #{ownerMemberId} ORDER BY TBG.GUESTBOOK_CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT TBG.ID, TBG.GUESTBOOK_CONTENT, TBG.GUESTBOOK_CREATED_AT, TBG.OWNER_MEMBER_ID, TBG.WRITER_MEMBER_ID, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS WRITER_NICKNAME, TBM.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL AS WRITER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_GUESTBOOK_LIKE TBGL WHERE TBGL.GUESTBOOK_ID = TBG.ID) AS LIKE_COUNT FROM TBL_GUESTBOOK TBG JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBG.WRITER_MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID WHERE TBG.ID = #{id}

SELECT TBG.ID, TBG.GUESTBOOK_CONTENT, TBG.GUESTBOOK_CREATED_AT, TBG.OWNER_MEMBER_ID, TBG.WRITER_MEMBER_ID, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS WRITER_NICKNAME, TBM.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL AS WRITER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_GUESTBOOK_LIKE TBGL WHERE TBGL.GUESTBOOK_ID = TBG.ID) AS LIKE_COUNT FROM TBL_GUESTBOOK TBG JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBG.WRITER_MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID WHERE TBG.GUESTBOOK_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY TBG.GUESTBOOK_CREATED_AT DESC
